description: Let workspace admins manage members and inspect membership activity.

userStories.title: Recording membership audit data
userStories.description: As an admin, I want membership changes recorded so the workspace keeps an audit trail.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit records include action, actor, target, and timestamp

userStories.title: Inviting workspace members
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite members by email so I can add people without database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can submit an invite by email
Invite creates a pending or active membership record
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Changing member roles
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member role so I can adjust access from viewer to editor or admin.
acceptanceCriteria: Role changes persist the selected role
Allowed roles are viewer, editor, and admin
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Revoking workspace access
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke a member so I can remove access when needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoking access removes or disables the member in the workspace
Revocation is recorded in the audit trail
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Viewing membership audit history
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so I can see who changed access.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page shows recent membership audit entries
Audit view includes invite, role change, and revoke events
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
